name: CM_ANIM_INTRO_LOOP
description: Two-phase animation player: intro sequence (plays once) → loop sequence (repeats infinitely). Automatically transitions from intro to loop on completion. If no intro provided, starts with loop immediately. Useful for splash screens and idle animations.
visualForm: Full-size container playing intro animation once, then seamlessly transitioning to looping animation
descriptionKo: 인트로 시퀀스(1회 재생) → 루프 시퀀스(무한 반복) 2단계 애니메이션 플레이어입니다. 인트로 완료 후 자동으로 루프로 전환되며, 스플래시 화면이나 대기 애니메이션에 적합합니다.
descriptionEn: Two-phase animation player: intro sequence (plays once) → loop sequence (repeats infinitely). Automatically transitions from intro to loop on completion. If no intro provided, starts with loop immediately. Useful for splash screens and idle animations.
